title: Stichorkis kwangtungensis

intro: Stichorkis kwangtungensis is a species of orchid native to southern China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve insulin sensitivity, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
